subcategories.name: Tell Me About Yourself
subcategories.description: Questions that open a person up

questions.text: Which song best describes your mood right now?
What recharges you when you are completely drained?
Which decision in your life do you not regret at all?
What do you keep putting off but have wanted to do for a long time?
Which book or film changed the way you see the world?
What counts as a true luxury to you?
Which superpower would you want and why that one?
What do you consider your greatest achievement?
Which question is on your mind the most right now?
What surprises you about people?
What do you do when you want to forget about everything?
Which person do you most want to impress and why?
What do you consider your greatest talent?
What is your favorite time of day and why?
What would you do if you had a whole year of free time?
Which hobby would you like to start right now?
Which language do you dream of learning?
What does a perfect day off look like to you?
What is your favorite meal and who makes it best?
What inspires you most in people?
Which place would you love to visit and why?
What do you dislike most about the modern world?
Which habit are you trying to build?
What is the symbol of success for you?
What could you do for hours without getting tired?
Which item do you always want to have with you?
What small thing do people rarely notice about you but you secretly love about yourself?
What is your biggest dream right now?
What do you value most about your own character?
Which book would you recommend everyone read?
What does true happiness mean to you?
What is your biggest win this year?
What would you like to teach other people?
Which mistake do you consider the most important lesson of your life?
What upsets you the most?
What is your favorite quote or saying?
What do you do for your mental health?
What surprises you about yourself?
What would you like to change about your own character?
Which quality do you respect most in others?
What is the most important thing you have learned in the past five years?
What is the bravest thing you have ever done?
What gives you a sense of peace?
Which habit or routine feels like a meaningful ritual to you?
What do you most want to do before the end of this year?
Which song do you listen to when you are sad?
What does being a good person mean to you?
Which weakness of yours have you come to accept?
Which part of your personality tends to surprise people when they first meet you?
Who do you want to be in 5 years?
Which shared adventure do you remember most vividly?
When did you realize we were real friends?
Which silly thing brought us closer than anything else?
Which conversation between us have you remembered the longest?
What did you do for me that I will never forget?
Which funny situation of ours became a legend?
Which place do you associate with our friendship?
Which adventure would you want to experience again together?
What do you value most about our friendship?
Which piece of advice from me have you held on to?
What do you think connects us?
Which tradition or ritual of ours makes you happy?
Which shared song or melody do you remember?
When did you first feel you could fully trust me?
What was our most ridiculous shared adventure?
Which thing we always planned but never did — and should finally make happen?
What is the first word that comes to mind when you think of our friendship?
Which funny story about us do you tell other people?
What did you feel when we had our first falling out and then made up?
Which conversation between us do you see as a turning point?
What brought us together during difficult times?
Which moment from our friendship would you frame and put on the wall?
What surprised you most about me over all our time as friends?
Which moment showed you I am a real friend?
Which night out together would you want to live again?
What did you value most about our friendship right at the start?
Which mistake of ours do you find funniest?
What makes you laugh most when you think back on our time together?
Which situation showed me your real support?
What did we always do together that quietly became our tradition?
Which inside phrase of ours do you still use?
What did you feel when we did not see each other for a long time?
Which shared dream of ours have we already made real?
What did you learn about yourself through our friendship?
Which situation of ours would you put into a book?
What did we do together that surprised even us?
Which adventure of ours do you consider the boldest?
What impressed you most about me in a hard moment?
What did you always know you could ask of me?
Which shared goal have we achieved together?
What do you feel when you think about our friendship?
Which simple moment between us is most precious to you?
What did you tell me that you told nobody else?
Which shared decision turned out to be the best one?
What brought us together in a completely unexpected way?
Which reunion after a long time apart was the warmest?
What do you want us to make sure we do together?
Which shared opinion do you still hold?
Which time did one of us really need the other — and showed up without being asked?
If you could keep one shared moment forever — which one would it be?

subcategories.name: Night Revelations
subcategories.description: Deep conversations at 3am in the kitchen

questions.text: What do you think about when you can't sleep?
What is hard for you to forgive yourself for?
When did you last cry and why?
What would you want to say to your 15-year-old self?
Which experience did you miss most in your life?
What are you most afraid of but never say out loud?
What has given you your biggest lesson in life?
When did you feel most alone?
What do you expect from a true friendship?
What gratitude lives inside you that you have never expressed?
What would have changed everything if you had done it differently?
Which truth about yourself is hardest to admit?
Which version of yourself do you only show in the dark and the quiet?
What changed you most in the past year?
Which truth have you long wanted to say but been afraid to?
What do you feel when everything is going wrong?
Which person do you want to apologize to?
What do you carry inside that most people would never guess about you?
Who do you truly want to become?
Which chapter of your life are you still not completely at peace with?
What upsets you most when you are alone?
Which dream do you believe is out of reach for you?
Which person have you lost and still grieve for?
Which emotion do you find the hardest to show to the people you love?
What is your deepest unhealed wound?
What do you want but are afraid to even want?
Which part of your past would you want to erase?
What frightens you most about the future?
Which person would you want to see one more time?
What did you never tell your parents?
What does being truly yourself mean to you?
Which person did you idealize the most and then came crashing down?
What makes you feel tiny in a big world?
Which part of yourself do you finally want to accept?
What is hardest for you to let go of?
What do you feel when nobody understands you?
Who do you definitely not want to become?
What does true freedom mean to you?
Which mistake do you never want to repeat?
What defines you most as a person?
When did you first feel like you truly understood who you are?
What would you want to feel one more time in your life?
What captivates you most about this world?
What is the one thing you have never let yourself fully want?
What do you think your younger self would feel seeing who you are now?
Which part of yourself faded over the years and you miss it?
What do you do when you feel like you can't cope?
Which person showed you who you could become?
What keeps you going when you want to give up everything?
Which question would you ask yourself if you knew the answer would be honest?

subcategories.name: What If…
subcategories.description: Funny and tricky situations to choose from

questions.text: What if you could live one day in any era in history?
What if everyone around you could see all your thoughts?
What if you were physically unable to lie — ever?
What if you were teleported right now to an unfamiliar city?
What if you could choose any career with no limits whatsoever?
What if you could talk to animals?
What if you had unlimited free time for a whole month?
What if you woke up in the body of a famous person?
What if you had to choose: never feel pain, or always know the truth?
What if you could change one decision from your past?
What if your biggest hobby became your job?
What if you found out you could live another 50 years exactly as you are?
What if you could ask anyone one question and they had to answer with complete honesty?
What if everyone suddenly knew your biggest secret?
What if you could choose where you were born?
What if you could feel exactly what another person is feeling for one full minute?
What if you could read someone else's thoughts for exactly one minute?
What if you had to live without music for a whole year?
What if you woke up 20 years in the future?
What if you could cancel one event in world history?
What if you had to choose between travelling forever and having your own home?
What if you couldn't use your phone for an entire week?
What if you could become any animal for one day?
What if you had to live in another country permanently?
What if you had an unlimited budget for one single day?
What if you had to choose between keeping your memory and having a future?
What if money did not exist — how would your daily life look different?
What if you could choose which age to stay at forever?
What if you found out your exact date of death?
What if you had no fears at all?
What if you had to live without one of your five senses?
What if you could choose your own family?
What if your biggest dream came true today?
What if you found a note from your future self telling you to stop doing one thing?
What if you had to describe your life as a film genre — which would it be and why?
What if you could choose any superpower — but had to give it to someone else?
What if you had to move to a new city tomorrow?
What if you could live inside any film or book?
What if you had to pick one skill to know perfectly?
What if you had to choose between love and a career?
What if you had never existed — what would be different in the world?
What if you could send a letter to yourself in the past?
What if you found out that your best quality is actually a weakness?
What if you had to choose: live 100 years in comfort or 50 years of adventure?
What if you could become invisible for one day?
What if you could remember nothing bad that ever happened to you?
What if everyone around you knew absolutely everything about you?
What if you had to live under a different name and identity for a whole year?
What if you could freeze time for one hour — when and where would you do it?
What if you could know for certain what your life looks like 10 years from now?
What is the most embarrassing situation of your life?
What did you do that you still haven't forgiven yourself for?
Which silly mistake did you make several times in a row?
Which lie did you make up that completely got out of hand?
What did you do hoping nobody would see?
Which awkward situation happened to you in public?
What did you do within five seconds of saying 'I would never do that'?
What is the most uncomfortable message you ever sent to the wrong person?
What is the most ridiculous thing you ever bought on impulse?
What did you do drunk that you never admitted to when sober?
Which 'adult' thing can you still not do properly?
What is your secret guilty pleasure or strange habit?
What did you do in a group that you were embarrassed about for a long time?
What did you say with total authority about something you actually knew nothing about?
What did you try to make romantic but it just came out ridiculous?
What funny mistake did you make because of a language barrier?
Which situation are you still trying to forget but it keeps coming back?
What did you do with the best intentions that backfired completely?
Which compliment did you completely mess up trying to give?
What did you do while trying to impress someone?
Which situation did you try to fix but only made worse?
What did you try for the first time and failed at completely?
Which word, name, or title did you mispronounce for years?
What were you doing 'in secret' until it was suddenly revealed?
Which advice did you give others that you never followed yourself?
Which situation did you think was totally normal until you found out it wasn't?
What did you do as a teenager that still makes you cringe?
Which public mistake can you still not forget years later?
What did you try to do alone when you should have asked for help?
Which truth did you accidentally say to the wrong person?
What did you do with total confidence only to discover you were completely wrong?
What is the most dramatic exit you ever made — only to have to come straight back?
Which shortcut you took ended up taking twice as long as just doing it properly?
Which pointless argument did you push to the end — and lose?
What did you do at absolutely the worst possible moment?
What is the most unnecessary drama you managed to create entirely for yourself?
Which thing did you swear you would never like — and are now completely obsessed with?
Which situation did you explain again and again but kept repeating anyway?
What did you do with good intentions but ended up offending someone?
What did you apologize for so many times it turned into its own inside joke?
What did you do purely because you wanted to look cool?
Which situation would you most like to erase from everyone's memory?
What did you do on your first day somewhere new that you laugh about now?
Which 'grown-up' concept did you not understand for way too long?
Which moment would you most like to watch back in slow motion just to understand what went wrong?
Which story about yourself can you still not tell without going red?
What did you try to say beautifully but it came out all wrong?
Which mistake did you make because you were too sure you were right?
What did you think was a brave move that turned out to be a complete disaster?
What is your most cringeworthy situation that has now become your favorite story to tell?
